package.name: quest2ros
package.description: Custom messages for the Quest2ROS app (OVR2ROSInputs, OVR2ROSHapticFeedback). The package name MUST be "quest2ros": the Quest app / ROS-TCP-Endpoint registers these types as quest2ros/OVR2ROSInputs, so both the field layout AND the package name must match for deserialization. Matches the official Quest2ROS message pkg.
